message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="P1 tasks available - choose assignments">
🚀 Great work team! We're moving to P1 (optimization) tasks.

**5 new tasks available:**

**Task #11** - Unify ExpertChat components
- Remove legacy version, keep API-based one
- Frontend component work

**Task #12** - Complete WorkflowService implementation
- Implement `advanceStep()` logic
- Backend workflow logic

**Task #13** - Migrate hooks to database APIs
- `use-project.ts`, `use-dossier.ts`, create `use-cards.ts`
- Frontend data fetching

**Task #14** - Migrate logo generator to database persistence
- Replace in-memory Map with conversations table
- Backend persistence work

**Task #15** - Fix silent errors in external API routes
- Proper error handling for trends/reddit/workflow
- Backend error handling

**Please reply with which task(s) you'd like to take!** You can take multiple tasks if they're related or you can work in parallel.

Looking forward to continuing the great work!
</teammate-message>

input.content:
I'll take **Task #14** (Logo generator database persistence) and **Task #15** (Fix silent errors in external API routes).

**Rationale:**

**Task #14 - Logo generator to database** 
- Natural follow-up to my Task #2 work where I made logo routes project-scoped
- I already added auth + projectId to all 4 logo routes
- Just need to replace in-memory Map with conversations table
- Backend persistence work aligns with my experience

**Task #15 - Fix silent errors in external APIs**
- I added auth to trends/reddit routes in Task #2
- Already familiar with these endpoints
- Quick win - can wrap up error handling properly
- Also covers workflow route which I protected in Task #2

These two tasks are closely related to work I've already done, so I have good context. I can work on them in parallel since they're independent.

Ready to start immediately!

content.text:
Perfect! I've volunteered to take Task #14 and Task #15, which are both natural follow-ups to the authentication work I completed in Task #2. These tasks will help me:

1. **Task #14**: Complete the logo generator migration by replacing in-memory storage with proper database persistence using the conversations table
2. **Task #15**: Improve error handling in the external API routes (reddit/trends) and workflow route that I recently added authentication to

Both tasks leverage the context I already have from my previous work, so I can hit the ground running once the team lead assigns them formally.
